mapper.sql: select vc.id, vc.street_office_id, vc.village_code, vc.village_name, vc.contact_person, vc.contact_phone, vc.address, vc.sort_order, vc.status, vc.del_flag, vc.create_by, vc.create_time, vc.update_by, vc.update_time, vc.remark, so.street_name as street_office_name from shebao_village_committee vc left join shebao_street_office so on vc.street_office_id = so.id
mapper.select: where vc.street_office_id = #{streetOfficeId} and vc.del_flag = '0' and vc.status = '0' order by vc.sort_order asc, vc.village_code asc
